context_notes: All 9 phases of the v1.0 milestone are complete. Phase 9 MCP Server Implementation was the final phase. The project now has: unified MCP package with stdio/HTTP transports, 4 real tool handlers (query, get, multi_get, status), SearchBackend with real DB connectivity, and 86% MCP test coverage. A deep code review found and fixed 17 issues (3 critical, 7 warning, 7 info). No active work in progress — this is a milestone boundary pause.
